question: In the Swedish VGU requirements, where should a superelevation runoff (skevningsövergång) be located, and what minimum longitudinal grade of the profile plane applies there to ensure drainage?

ground_truth.value: Runoff placed where the profile plane longitudinal grade >= 1,0 % to ensure effective drainage of the whole carriageway.
ground_truth.quote: profilplanets längslutning är större eller lika med 1,0 % för att säkerställa effektiv

candidates.label: A
candidates.answer: Min longitudinal grade of the profile at a runoff ~0.5% (uncertain).

candidates.label: B
candidates.answer: Skevningsövergang placed where profile-plane longitudinal grade >= 1.0% to ensure drainage.

candidates.label: C
candidates.answer: Skevningsövergang placed where profile-plane longitudinal grade >= 1.0%; not where < 0.5%.

candidates.label: D
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: E
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)
